comment: SHA-256 manifest for the v1 production splits produced by AWS spot generation run 20260426T092703Z. Reproduces what an auditor would compute by running scripts/hash_manifest.py against the synced run artefacts. The split files themselves live under data/processed/aws-v1-20260426T092703Z/ which is gitignored; downloading them is documented in scripts/aws/README.md Part A.3. The smoke-build manifest at artifacts/manifest/manifest.json refers to an earlier 8088/1217/1217/1219-record dataset retained as a reference fixture and is NOT the v1 release.
